title: ampelocissus lecardii
intro: Ampelocissus lecardii, also known as the climbing grapevine or leopard's claw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Vitaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for various health issues. The health benefits of Ampelocissus lecardii include reducing fever, treating digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
